visualizations.title: Algebraic Definition of Absolute Value
visualizations.description: Piecewise definition showing that absolute value strips away a number's negative sign.

steps.explanation: If x is already positive or zero, the absolute value is just x.
If x is negative, multiplying it by -1 makes it positive: -(-x) = x.

visualizations.title: Absolute Value as Distance from Zero
visualizations.description: Watch how -3 and +3 both lie exactly 3 units away from zero, resulting in the same absolute value of 3.
